name: Magic Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate at the top of a double boiler without stirring. Remove from heat and stir in the condensed milk, salt, and vanilla until blended.
2. Press the mixture into a one-inch-high block on wax paper lined pan.
3. Chill until firm. Turn out onto wax paper and remove it. Cut into serving pieces.
4. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 1/2 pound.
